articles.title: Bitcoin's 'Coinbase premium' just posted its longest bullish streak since October's record high of $126,000
articles.description: Bitcoin's Coinbase premium has been positive for 14 straight days, the longest bullish streak since BTC hit its all time high of $126,000 in October.

articles.title: Privacy protocol Umbra shuts front end to stifle Kelp exploiters
articles.description: Umbra has shut down its front end to stop hackers, but says it can’t stop the use of its smart contracts or another version of its open-source front end.

articles.title: US law firm apologizes after AI hallucinations made it to a legal filing
articles.description: Sullivan & Cromwell’s Andrew Dietderich said the company has AI policies to prevent incorrect citations and other errors, but procedures weren’t followed on this occasion.

articles.title: Bitcoin climbs to $78,100 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy
articles.description: Bitcoin traded at $77,541 on Wednesday morning, up 2.2% over 24 hours and 4.3% on the week, after Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and Strategy disclosed its largest BTC purchase in 17 months.

articles.title: Tron's Justin Sun sues Trump-linked World Liberty Financial over frozen assets
articles.description: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged.

articles.title: Chinese crypto mogul Li Lin’s private trading arm is set to move into a Hong Kong-listed wealth firm
articles.description: The transfer effectively moves part of Li’s private trading operation into a public company where he is the largest shareholder.

articles.title: Coinbase highlights Algorand, Aptos' work to mitigate quantum threat
articles.description: Coinbase’s quantum advisory board says quantum computing isn’t yet a threat, but has urged for upgrade work to begin, with some blockchains being less prepared than others.

articles.title: Justin Sun sues World Liberty Financial over token lockup
articles.description: Sun said the lawsuit is to protect his rights as a WLFI token holder and doesn't change his support of US President Donald Trump and his administration’s efforts to make the US crypto-friendly.
